――その日、エメルダは特ダネを求めて酒場に張っていた。: —That day, Emeralda was staking out the tavern in search of a scoop.
（クソ上司めぇえ……<br>『さっさと特ダネ持ってこい！』とか気軽に言いやがって:
(That damn boss of mine...
'Just bring me a scoop already!' he says so casually!)
（どうせほしいのは前線基地の醜聞でしょ！<br>えぇ、えぇ、いいわよ、やってやろ:
(Like he really wants some dirt on the Frontline Base!
Yeah, yeah, fine, I'll do it.)
（ここの酒場の２階……娼館に特ダネさんが頻繁に通ってるわ！）:
(The second floor of this tavern... Scoop's been frequenting the
brothel!)
（きっと複数の娼婦を抱えて悪いことしてるんでしょ！<br>知らんけど！）:
(I bet he's got multiple courtesans and is up to no good!
Not like I know for sure!)
（しばらくは客のふりして普通に飲んで――隙を見て２階の部屋に<br>潜り込んじゃ:
(I'll pose as a customer, have a drink, then slip upstairs.
Scoop, I'm counting on you for a juicy story!)
（よしっ、潜入成功♪<br>思ったより簡単だったなぁ。ザル警備、助かる～っ♪）:
(Yes! Infiltration successful!
That was easier than I thought. Shoddy security, just what I needed!)
（あとは、特ダネさんが入った部屋の様子をどうにかして――）: (Now I just need to somehow get a look at the room Scoop entered—)
ふふふっ。だめですよーっ。<br>そぉーれっ♪:
Fufufu. That won't do!
Here I go!♪
エメルダの背後に現れたルディアが、<br>ぷしゅーっ、と香水を振り掛ける。眠り薬:
Ludia appeared behind Emeralda and sprayed her with perfume laced
with a sleeping drug—pshew.
ふふっ、悪い子にはお仕置きしないとですねー。<br>さて、あの方を呼んできましょ:
Fufu, we'll have to punish a bad girl, won't we?
Now then, shall I go call that person?♪
う、う～ん……あれ、あたし、寝て……？: Ugh, ugh... Huh, was I sleeping...?
目が覚めると、エメルダは真っ暗な部屋の中にいた。<br>……と思ったのだが、すぐ:
When Emeralda woke up, she found herself in a pitch-dark room. Or so
she thought—she soon realized something was different.
（違う！ これ、目隠しだ！？ しかも縛られてる！？<br>おまけに裸じゃん！ な:
(No! Is this a blindfold? And I'm tied up! On top of that, I'm naked!
What the hell is this? Where are my clothes?)
暴れて逃れようとするが、身動きは取れない。<br>じたばたしているうちに、誰かが:
She thrashed around, trying to break free, but she couldn't move. As
she writhed, she sensed someone entering the room.
